# Surface Wave Inversion

**Summary**: A technique to invert surface waves for more accurate near-surface velocity estimation.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018]] applied surface wave inversion to update the top 200m of the model and improve wavelet accuracy.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- SWI provided more accurate velocity at top 200m, leading to a dramatic improvement on the subsurface image. ([[2018-mohamed|Mohamed, 2018, p. 46]])
